items.title: Quarterly Platform Reliability Program
items.description: Recurring investment to maintain reliability, release safety, and trust across core CRM, service, and platform flows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Maintain safe release practices during platform change.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Prevent platform fragmentation while maintaining uptime.

productBricks.change: Maintain trust controls and access quality.

deliveryChannels.change: Maintain data and AI runtime continuity.
